topic: England 4-2 Croatia — Bellingham's early second-half strike breaks Croatian resistance after they twice fought back in a Group L thriller
subject: jude-bellingham

hook.spoken_hook: Two hundred million pounds. One World Cup moment to justify it all. For Bellingham, tonight was everything.

scenes.voiceover: Two hundred million pounds. One World Cup moment to justify it all. For Bellingham, tonight was everything.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Vertical 9:16, deep black background, gold gradient accents (#F7D774 to #C8881B). Bold white condensed lines: '200 MILLION' / 'ONE MOMENT.' Premium broadcast tease, no faces, no logos.

scenes.voiceover: England scored first, but Croatia do not scare. Baturina pulled one back. Then Musa right on halftime. Two-two at the break and the old doubts came rushing back. Would Bellingham disappear like before?
scenes.graphic_prompt: Vertical 9:16, deep black with tense gold-edged atmosphere, bold white condensed '2-2' in the center, 'SUBSCRIBE' in smaller gold type below. The balance tipping. Premium broadcast, no faces.

scenes.voiceover: First minute of the second half. Anderson slipped him through. This was the moment England's golden boy had been waiting for.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Vertical 9:16, deep black with tense gold-edged atmosphere, bold white condensed 'BELLINGHAM. 47"' in the center with gold radiance lines building. The tipping point. Premium, no faces.

scenes.voiceover: He made no mistake. Three-two. The resistance was broken. One swing of his right foot and England were ahead to stay.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Vertical 9:16, deep black exploding into gold, bold white condensed 'BELLINGHAM' in the center with gold radiance lines. Hero arrives. Turning point. Premium, no faces, no logos.

scenes.voiceover: England top Group L. Croatia on watch. Ghana and Panama next.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Vertical 9:16, deep black with gold accents, clean broadcast standings table, bold white condensed type. Premium, no faces, no logos.

scenes.voiceover: Your daily World Cup story. Don't miss the next one.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Vertical 9:16, deep black, gold gradient accents, bold white condensed 'DAILY WORLD CUP' lockup with the TikiTaka monogram, night-stadium glow behind. Clean, premium, no faces.

comment_bait: Croatia or Ghana — who finishes 2nd in Group L? 👀
cta: Subscribe for your daily World Cup story
music_mood: Cinematic, building — a tense opening that swells into a triumphant anthem as Bellingham strikes, then settles into confident victory. Premium broadcast energy.

thumbnail.concept: Deep black and gold, bold white '200 MILLION' in condensed type, 'BELLINGHAM' in gold over a silhouetted figure, England flag on the left, Croatia flag fading on the right. Burden of a nation. Premium feel, no faces.

youtube_title: England 4-2 Croatia: Bellingham Carries England Past Croatia in Group L Thriller | World Cup 2026
youtube_description: The most expensive teenager in history. One World Cup moment to justify it all. Jude Bellingham delivered when England needed him most — striking just two minutes into the second half to break Croatian resistance in a 4-2 Group L thriller at AT&T Stadium. Harry Kane opened the scoring (12'), but Croatia answered twice through Baturina (36') and Musa (45+5'). With the game locked at 2-2 at the break and the old doubts creeping back, Bellingham took over (47') and Rashford sealed it late (85'). England top Group L. Bellingham owns the night. But Croatia, Ghana and Panama are all still watching. Your daily World Cup stories, every day. #worldcup2026 #england #croatia #bellingham
instagram_caption: Two hundred million pounds. One moment. Bellingham delivered. 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿 England 4-2 Croatia — Croatia came back twice, but Bellingham broke them. England top Group L, but who finishes 2nd — Croatia or Ghana? 👇 Subscribe for your daily World Cup story.
